ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "experiment_location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment is conducted */,
  "experiment_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "experiment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the experiment */,
  "experiment_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the experiment */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of material (e.g., polymer, metal) */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the material */,
  "material_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the material */,
  "material_properties" TEXT /* Key properties of the material (e.g., density, melting point) */,
  "material_cost" REAL /* Cost of the material */,
  "material_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., consumer goods, industrial) */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material used in the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_cost" REAL /* Cost of the product */,
  "product_production_date" TEXT /* Date the product was produced */,
  "product_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating of the product */,
  "product_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this result belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tested */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Measurement time for the result (e.g., 1s, 5s, 1min) */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the result (e.g., preliminary, final) */,
  "result_source" TEXT /* Source of the result (e.g., lab equipment, software analytics) */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "result_measurement_type" INTEGER /* Type of measurement (foreign key to measurements table) */,
  "mic" REAL /* Measurement result for mic */,
  "ficus" REAL /* Measurement result for ficus */,
  "chair" REAL /* Measurement result for chair */,
  "hotdog" REAL /* Measurement result for hotdog */,
  "materials" REAL /* Measurement result for materials */,
  "drums" REAL /* Measurement result for drums */,
  "ship" REAL /* Measurement result for ship */,
  "lego" REAL /* Measurement result for lego */,
  "avg_result" REAL /* Average result from the measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_result_measurement_type FOREIGN KEY ("result_measurement_type") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "researcher_position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "researcher_contact" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "researcher_supervisor" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher's supervisor */,
  "researcher_status" TEXT /* Status of the researcher (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., tensile strength, thermal conductivity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., N, W, °C) */,
  "measurement_range" TEXT /* Range of the measurement */,
  "measurement_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., internal database, external vendor) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., lab equipment, software analytics) */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "source_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_logs" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who generated the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the experiment */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access event */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the access event */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
